#### Runbook Catalog

Overview of the runbooks and templates available in this portfolio.

##### Included

- migration plan
- MOP outline
- cutover runbook
- rollback plan
- hypercare plan
- handover run
- Teams Phone receptionist flow DAT template
- Teams Phone as-built DAT template
- Teams Phone RUN / DEX operations template

##### How to use the templates

Use the templates as reusable delivery artefacts, not as tenant-changing procedures.

- Use the migration, cutover, rollback and hypercare templates to structure controlled delivery.
- Use the DAT templates to describe the architecture and service objects that were delivered.
- Use the DEX / RUN operations template to make routine checks, standard changes and incident triage repeatable after handover.
- Keep customer-specific commands, tenant identifiers, phone numbers, escalation paths and evidence exports outside the public repository.
